channel.title: yrdsl.app blog
channel.description: Updates on yrdsl.app — build progress, sample sales, and how-tos.

item.title: yrdsl.app, WhatsApp, and a little server in my son's room
item.description: How a photo on my phone ends up on the yard sale, without me opening a browser. And how to wire up the same setup yourself.

item.title: yrdsl.app and the onslaught of AI side-projects
item.description: A digital yard sale, built right when everyone else is shipping side-projects. A note on the flood, and why I'm shipping anyway.
